cross_scene_arcs.title: From Fear to Agency in Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale evolves from a fearful passenger anxious about flying into an active survivor who asserts control during emergencies, resists captors, and executes escape plans.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: frightened travel agent with fear of flying
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: capable and decisive agent of her own survival

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Flash: From Conflict to Loyalty
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale's dynamic with Flash shifts from initial friction to mutual reliance, emotional connection, and ultimately romantic commitment as they face danger and exile together.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Resistance Against Coercion and Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale repeatedly resists forced participation in dangerous or dehumanizing situations, from being taken to space against her will to resisting Ming's reproductive coercion and escaping captivity.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: actively undermining captors and evading forced marriage
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: ongoing threat of physical and reproductive coercion

cross_scene_arcs.title: Adaptation to Alien World and New Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale transitions from a displaced Earth woman to a key figure in Mongo's conflicts, gaining new abilities like telepathy and ultimately accepting Mongo as her home.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: designated as reproductive instrument by Ming
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: accepts Mongo as her new home and embraces future with Flash

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Distraction to Leadership Under Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash evolves from a self-focused athlete distracting during a crisis to an active emergency responder who helps stabilize a crashing plane and leads a successful escape, earning respect.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: successfully leads escape from imminent explosion

cross_scene_arcs.title: Protective Partnership with Dale Arden
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash's relationship with Dale shifts from tense cooperation during crisis to deep mutual reliance, marked by protective actions, telepathic coordination, and eventual romantic commitment.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: begins cooperative trust with Dale during emergency
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: adjustment to permanent life on Mongo

cross_scene_arcs.title: Reluctant Hero to Unifying Victor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash transitions from attempting peaceful contact as a captive to becoming a celebrated hero who defeats Ming and unites former enemies, ultimately embracing leadership on Mongo.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Covert Infiltration and Stranded Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash undergoes an invisibility experiment that partially succeeds, then becomes stranded when his capsule is destroyed, forcing him to continue a solo infiltration mission.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to complete the mission without support or escape options

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defiance and Control in High-Stakes Situations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash asserts agency by seizing control of a spacecraft and later orchestrating a coordinated escape, demonstrating increasing willingness to override others to achieve critical objectives.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: shifts from cooperative to adversarial with Princess Aura
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: initiates coordinated escape plan with Dale
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Dale must carry out the rescue alone while held captive and vulnerable

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Coercion and Captivity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zarkov transitions from a lone scientist enforcing compliance through violence to a captive in an alien regime, losing control over both his mission and his freedom.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov holds Munson at gunpoint to initiate launch
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Zarkov is captured and handcuffed by the Red Men on an alien planet
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His authority is entirely undermined; survival depends on others

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Stand Against Tyranny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zarkov shifts from passive captive to active moral resistor, challenging Ming’s use of science and catalyzing rebellion through direct appeal and technical action.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov condemns Ming's destructive use of science
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Zarkov activates a critical switch to disrupt the plasma system under protection of allies
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full impact of his sabotage remains uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Mission Commander to Permanent Exile
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zarkov evolves from launching a one-way mission to save Earth to accepting permanent exile on Mongo, redefining home after the loss of return capability.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov forcibly launches the capsule on a suicidal mission
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Zarkov declares Mongo as their new home after the return capsule is lost
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His personal future and role on Mongo remain undefined

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shifting Control Over Crew and Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zarkov's relationship with his companions shifts from coercive control to cooperative survival and finally to familial belonging, reflecting his evolving role from captor to anchor.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov forces Munson at gunpoint to join the mission
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Zarkov affirms a shared sense of home with Flash and Dale
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Trust remains strained from earlier use of force
